## Drift Check

- Auth/account added? 
- Database/server persistence added?
- Generic foundation not required by Tic Tac Toe or Vietnamese Caro?
- Game rules coupled to UI/session/transport?
- Trystero leaks outside transport adapter?
- CI depends on real Trystero/WebRTC?
- Phaser/canvas introduced when DOM/CSS is enough?
- Chat omitted where required?
- Mobile considerations included?
- Look/feel/audio/effects included where relevant?
- GitHub Pages deployability preserved?
- Durable decisions stored in repo docs?
